user.title: Tisseo Configuration
user.description:
Configure global Tisseo settings.

You can use **mock mode** to test without an API key, or enter your Tisseo API key for real data.

To get an API key, email opendata@tisseo.fr

data.api_key: API Key (optional if using mock mode)
data.debug: Debug mode (logs API calls and responses)

transport_mode.title: Select Transport Mode
transport_mode.description: Choose the type of transport you want to monitor.

line.title: Select Line
line.description: Choose the line you want to monitor.

stop.title: Select Stop
stop.description: Choose the stop you want to monitor.

options.title: Options
options.description: Configure alert settings for this stop.

schedule.title: Time Windows
schedule.description:
Configure all smart-update windows in one place.

Current windows: {windows}

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Tisseo
reauth_confirm.description:
Your Tisseo API key is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

To get an API key, email opendata@tisseo.fr

error.api_key_required: API key is required when not using mock mode
error.invalid_time_range: Start time must be before end time
error.no_windows_configured: At least one time window is required
error.no_windows_to_remove: There are no time windows to remove
error.window_days_required: Please select at least one day

abort.no_lines: No lines available for this transport mode
abort.no_routes: No routes available for this line
abort.no_stops: No stops available for this route

api_failure.title: Tisseo API unreachable for {stop_name}
api_failure.description:
The Tisseo API has been unreachable for {failures} consecutive attempts. The last error was:

`{error}`

Departure data may be stale. The integration will automatically recover when the API becomes available again.
